# zkCoins

> zkCoins is a self-custodial wallet for **Shielded CSV**, a privacy protocol for Bitcoin. Amounts, sender, receiver and transaction history stay **off-chain**, proven with zero-knowledge and verified client-side. Each transfer publishes only a **~64-byte nullifier** to Bitcoin — about 16 vBytes on-chain. No soft fork, no sidechain, no coordinator.

## Key facts
- zkCoins is a **Client-Side Validation layer anchored to Bitcoin L1**. It is **not** a separate blockchain, altcoin, or native protocol token — value lives in client-side-validated coins. Moving on-chain BTC in and out uses a **bridge**, which is outside the protocol and on the roadmap.
- Shielded CSV works on Bitcoin **as it exists today** — no soft fork, no hard fork, no consensus change.
- Coin data (amounts, balances, history) **never touches the chain**. In the zkCoins v1 spec each transfer publishes its **~64-byte nullifier** (the pair `Pkᵢ ‖ Rᵢ`) directly to Bitcoin as a half-aggregated signature — about **16 vBytes** on-chain per transfer, roughly an order of magnitude smaller than a ~140-vByte Bitcoin transfer, and constant no matter how many coins the transfer moves. Bitcoin itself holds every nullifier a verifier needs, and the first on-chain occurrence of a state key selects the one valid transition — so there is **no off-chain batch data and no data-availability assumption** for the double-spend view. Throughput is on the order of **~100 transactions per second**, the Shielded CSV envelope.
- Proving system: **Plonky2 + Poseidon-Goldilocks** (recursion-native, SNARK-friendly hash).
- **Self-custodial**: keys are generated and stored locally in the browser and never leave the device. Peer-to-peer, permissionless publishing, no coordinator or custodian.
- Based on the paper *Shielded CSV: Private and Efficient Client-Side Validation* by Jonas Nick, Liam Eagen and Robin Linus (IACR ePrint 2025/068).

- English (default): https://zkcoins.com/
- Deutsch: https://zkcoins.com/de/
- Français: https://zkcoins.com/fr/
- Italiano: https://zkcoins.com/it/
- Español: https://zkcoins.com/es/

## Core pages
- [zkCoins home](https://zkcoins.com/): overview, how it works, roadmap, FAQ (also /de/ /fr/ /it/ /es/)
- [Wallet](https://zkcoins.app): the self-custodial zkCoins wallet (web / PWA)
- [Documentation](https://docs.zkcoins.app): architecture, protocol, privacy model, wallet guide
- [Brand kit](https://github.com/zk-coins/landing-page/tree/HEAD/brand): logo, color, typography, voice, design tokens

- [Shielded CSV whitepaper — ePrint 2025/068](https://eprint.iacr.org/2025/068)
- [ZeroSync prototype](https://github.com/ZeroSync/ZKCoins)
